About Motel Coach

From Cleaning Rooms to Managing 16+ Properties

I did not enter hospitality through theory. I built my career from the ground up—cleaning rooms, working reception and handling maintenance tasks inside real motels. I have a practical approach to managing your motel asset that starts with the basics; clean rooms, quality maintenance planning, high quality customer service and effective marketing strategies.

A small motel is a single operating system made up of a 1000 individual levers. If one lever moves incorrectly, performance drops. Motel Coach systematically optimizes your motels performance.

Real-World Experience

My progression was practical and performance-driven, overseeing more than 200 staff and full operational accountability across:

  • Regional Australia & Brisbane
  • International Markets (London)
  • Brands: Hilton, Accor, and InterContinental Hotels Group

The scale changes. The principles do not. “A Motel is made up of 1,000 small levers. Profitability isn’t lost in one big mistake; it erodes through small misalignments repeated daily.”

Our Philosophy

We do not specialize in large chain hotels. We specialize in independent operators who need clarity, structure, and measurable improvement.

  1. Occupancy is not the objective. We focus growing profit and stability.
  2. A motel is 1000 small levers. We strategically improve your motel’s performance.
  3. Reactive decisions destabilize. Systems create motel owner freedom.

How We Support You

  • Fractional COO: For motel owners looking for more performance, and reduced involvement in their motel. Motel Coach can step in and manage your on-site managers.
  • Motel Management Training: The on-site manager is the biggest asset or liability for a motel owner. We train on-site managers to increase your assets performance.
  • Motel Marketing: We market your motel, our initial focus is on the optimisation of your existing distribution channels; website, pms booking engine, Google, otas and GDS.
  • Property Audits: We complete a thorough review of your motels operations and marketing efforts and provide an actional plan to improve your motels profitability.
  • GuestPoint PMS Training: We provide GuestPoint PMS training to help you master your motels operations.

Our Clients

We work with some of Australia’s highest rated motels:

  • Casa Nostra Motel Rockhampton: We started our career in this motel and have worked with them on-going over the past several years Casa Nostra Motel Rockhampton

  • Crossroads Eco Motel Port Augusta: A high quality motel in Port Augusta Crossroads Ecomotel

  • Casa Nostra Motel Mackay: We managed the relaunch of the Casa Nostra Motel Mackay following a re-brand and renovation. Casa Nostra Motel Mackay

Industry Recognition

Our operational frameworks have been recognized and published by leading Australian accommodation authorities:

  • Accom News: Read our featured article on How to win your first 21 days as a motel manager
  • Accom News: Read our featured article on Op ed: A day in the life of a motel manager

We work with leading property management providers as partners

  • GuestPoint: Recommended motel management consultant](https://www.guestpoint.com/resources/relief-managers/)

  • SiteMinder A partner with the largest motel channel manager.

Work With Us

We only work with motel clients that we can drive performance improvements with. If you are looking for additional support, want to step back from your motel investment or want more performance, contact our team today.

Motel owners who implement formal operational frameworks report significantly improved guest satisfaction and protected profit margins. Comprehensive training on these frameworks is available through our specialized Motel Management Training Courses.

Independent operators facing occupancy volatility require structured rate discipline to secure direct bookings. Our Performance-Focused Motel Consultancy Services provide the exact systems needed to stabilize your asset.

Ready to Master Motel Operations?

Stop guessing and start yielding. Get the definitive 190+ page manual on Australian motel management, packed with hundreds of operational templates and checklists.

Buy the Book View Training Courses

Trusted by independent operators across Australia and New Zealand.

Motel Coach

Operational engineering for independent Australian motels. Moving owners from reactive management to systems-based profitability.
